title: Adult and Pediatric First Aid/CPR/AED
description: Certified in responding to cardiac and breathing emergencies, and performing life-saving interventions.

title: IT Specialist - Java
description: Earners of this badge demonstrate that they can recognize, write, and debug Java code that will logically solve a problem.

title: FCC Radio Operator License
description: Authorizes the holder to operate and maintain radio communication equipment.
